asset_scan.notes: scan-batch-parallel.py with 8 workers scanned 2165 courses in 13.5 min (2.7/s). 2869 lecture titles across 149 courses.

crossref.notes: SSH tunnel not active. generate-matches.py searches Wikipedia API across 25 WikiProjects, detects templates via mwparserfromhell, matches by keyword overlap with OCW courses. 156 articles across 25 projects after filtering.

l1_refideas.match_corpus: 156 articles across 25 WikiProjects (filtered from 310 with MIT-internal, outlines, single-word, institutions, organizations, geo-locale filters)
l1_refideas.notes: Full pipeline: generate-matches.py (API search + mwparserfromhell template detection) → prioritize-matches.py (template gate + IDF-weighted overlap + specificity scoring) → apply-l1-refideas.py (live posting). Modes: rank, -v verbose, --interactive N, --apply-top N --yes. All demo data replaced with live Wikipedia API queries.

l2_external_links.notes: CLI refactored 2026-06-03: --course slug/URL mode auto-resolves from local wiki. Legacy --course-id/--course-title/--course-url still supported. Tests: 26. Two bugs fixed: (1) insertion before navboxes/categories when External links is last section, (2) regex now handles *[url (no space after *)).
